evals.prompt: add project shortcut for my client project at ~/client-project with alias 'cln'
expectations: Alias should be added to shell config (~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc)
Alias command should include 'cd' and 'git pull --ff-only' and 'tx-claude'

evals.prompt: create quick launch alias 'myapp' for /Users/me/projects/my-app with description 'My Application'
expectations: Skill should parse alias, directory, and description correctly
Comment 'My Application' should appear in shell config
Alias should be usable immediately after shell reload

evals.prompt: how do I create a tmux session in bash?
set up a git pull workflow for my projects

expectations: Should return error: 'Directory does not exist'

evals.prompt: create shortcut with alias '123invalid' pointing to ~/my-project
expectations: Skill should validate alias format (must start with letter/underscore)
Should return error about invalid alias format
